calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion For Reconsideration Of The Order Dismissing The Case
Off Calendar Oct-15-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Damon Carter; Dept. 505
Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:44am and concluding at 9:53am.

Plaintiff Orlando Garcia appearing via zoom.
Attorney for Plaintiff Prathina Reddy Price appeared via zoom.
Defendants Big Save Market, Inc., Muhamad Edais, and Amerah Edais not appearing.

Counsel for Plaintiff presents summary of case and an offer of proof.

Court examines Plaintiff ORLANDO GARCIA and she confirms statements made by counsel.

The matter is submitted.

Based on the documents filed, the statement made by Plaintiff and its Counsel, consideration and good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff ORLANDO GARCIA, and against Defendants Big Save Market, Inc., Muhamad Edais, and Amerah Edais, as follows:

Damages: $4,000.00
Prejudgment Interest: $0
Attorney Fees: $1,000.00
Costs: $982.94

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $5,982.94

Proposed judgment signed and filed this date.

Notice Of Motion For Reconsideration Of The Order Dismissing The Case
Off Calendar Sep-10-2025 Continued To Oct-15-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for Plaintiff's Motion for Reconsideration of the Order Dismissing the Case.

Dept. 514; Judge Michelle Tong; Not Reported

Plaintiff Orlando Garcia represented by Prathima Reddy Price, Esq. via Zoom Video Conference.
Defendant Big Save Market, Inc. not appearing.

Plaintiff's request to continue hearing is GRANTED.
Court orders matter continued to Oct-15-2025 at 09:00 a.m. in Department 505. Plaintiff's client is permitted to appear via Zoom Video Conference.

Notice Of Motion For Reconsideration Of The Order Dismissing The Case
Off Calendar Aug-15-2025 Continued To Sep-10-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for Plaintiff's motion for reconsideration.

Dept. 505; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:10 am and concluding at 9:19 am.

Plaintiff Orlando Garcia not appearing, but is represented by Prathima Reddy Price, ESQ via Zoom video confrence.
Defendant Big Save Market Inc. not appearing.

The Court Grants Plaintiff's motion for reconsideration.

The Court Orders the matter continued to September 10, 2025 at 9:00 am in D505 for prove-up hearing.

Plaintiff is to send courtsey copies of the default packet to department 505 at least 10 days prior to the September 10 hearing date.

Proposed order for reconsideration signed and filed this date. (D505)

Notice Of Motion For Reconsideration Of The Order Dismissing The Case
Off Calendar Jul-23-2025 Continued To Aug-15-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for Plaintiff's motion for Notice of Motion for Reconsideration of the ORder Dismissing the Case filed by Plaintiff Orlando Garcia

Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: D. Carter; Dept 505;

Matter not reported.

Counsel for the Plaintiff Prathima Reddy Price appeared via zoom.
Defendant Big Save Market, Inc. did not appear.

The court did not receive any courtesy copies re: this matter.

This hearing is continued to August 15, 2025 at 9:00am in dept. 505 for submission of the pleadings related to this matter.

Notice Of Motion For Reconsideration Of The Order Dismissing The Case
Off Calendar Jun-18-2025 Continued To Jul-23-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for plaintiff's request for reconsideration of the order dismissing the case.

Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Damon Carter; Deputies Gasper and Brown; Dept. 505
Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 10:08 a.m. and concluding at 10:12 a.m.

Plaintiff Orlando Garcia appearing represented by Prathima Reddy Price, Esq., testifies via Zoom Video Conference.
Defendant Big Save Market, Inc. not appearing.

The court finds good cause to continue this matter to July 23, 2025 at 9:00am to allow plaintiff to provide notice of this hearing to the defendant. At the next hearing, the court will hear argument to vacate dismissal and enter default.

Plaintiff witness may appear via zoom.

Notice Of Motion For Reconsideration Of The Order Dismissing The Case
Off Calendar May-14-2025 Continued To Jun-18-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505

Notice Of Motion For Reconsideration Of The Order Dismissing The Case
Off Calendar Apr-21-2025 Continued To May-14-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF ORLANDO GARCIA's Motion For Reconsideration Of The Order Dismissing The Case.

Transferred and continued to May 14, 2025, to be heard at 9:00 a.m. in Department 505, which entered the underlying order on March 12, 2025, dismissing the case without prejudice.
